fields.name: Skulls & Death
fields.description: Dark and deadly designs featuring skulls, skeletons, and the macabre. For those who wear their mortality with pride.

fields.name: Weird Animals
fields.description: Pugs in battle helmets, roosters as rockstars, and other animals gone metal. Wholesome weird at its finest.

fields.name: Gym Therapy
fields.description: Iron therapy meets metal aesthetics. Motivational designs for warriors who lift heavy and embrace the grind.

fields.name: Dark Humor
fields.description: Twisted, sarcastic, and darkly funny designs. For those who laugh at the absurd.

fields.name: F-CAW-F Raven Skull Gothic T-Shirt – Heavy Metal Dark Art Tee
fields.description: Channel legendary power with the F-Caw-F Tee! Featuring an epic viking crow engulfed in flames and bold "F-Caw-F" text, this striking graphic t-shirt brings myth to life. It's more than just apparel; it's a symbol of strength. Experience ultimate comfort in this high-quality, unique design. Perfect for everyday heroes and anyone seeking a powerful, eye-catching tee. Add this iconic F-Caw-F shirt to your collection today!
fields.meta_description: Unleash dark energy with the F-CAW-F gothic raven t-shirt. Heavy metal festival vibes, bold occult artwork, and fearless alternative style.

fields.name: War Pig Metal Tee
fields.description: A ferocious war pig with tongue out, ready for battle. This design screams attitude and rebellion. For those who refuse to be tamed.
fields.meta_description: War Pig metal t-shirt - fierce animal design with punk rock attitude. Original Hendoshi artwork.

fields.name: This Is My Jolly Face Tee
fields.description: Dark Santa pug with glowing red eyes and a menacing grin. This is as jolly as it gets. Perfect for those who celebrate the holidays with a touch of darkness.
fields.meta_description: This Is My Jolly Face - dark humor Christmas pug t-shirt. Twisted holiday design for metal fans.

fields.name: Exercise Your Demons Hoodie
fields.description: A skeletal warrior lifting weights in a gothic shield design. Turn your inner demons into gains. Premium heavyweight hoodie for cold gym sessions and dark aesthetics.
fields.meta_description: Exercise Your Demons hoodie - skeleton gym design. Premium heavyweight hoodie for lifters who embrace darkness.

fields.name: Meltdown Skull Tee
fields.description: A psychedelic melting skull in vibrant chaos. Reality is overrated. This trippy design blends death metal with surreal artistry for a truly unique look.
fields.meta_description: Meltdown Skull t-shirt - psychedelic death metal design. Surreal skull artwork for alternative fashion lovers.

fields.name: Hendoshi Logo Sticker Pack
fields.description: Unleash your inner weird with the Hendoshi Logo Sticker Pack! Get 5 weatherproof, die-cut skull pug stickers perfect for laptops, water bottles, guitars, and more. Show off your unique style and Hendoshi love wherever you go. These iconic stickers are built to last and make a statement. Grab your pack today and wear your weird with pride!
fields.meta_description: Unleash your weird! Get 5 weatherproof, die-cut Hendoshi skull pug stickers. Perfect for laptops, water bottles & more. Show your unique style. Grab yours!

fields.name: Headbanger Graphic Tee
fields.description:
Turn up the volume and embrace the chaos. The Headbanger Graphic Tee is a tribute to the front-row energy of a sold-out metal show. Featuring a gritty, spiked-helmet skull with electrified details and fire-red eyes, this shirt captures the raw power of underground rock culture.

Crafted from premium, soft-touch cotton for a comfortable fit that survives the mosh pit and the streets alike. Whether you’re a lifelong metalhead or just love a bold, aggressive aesthetic, this tee is built to make a statement.
fields.meta_description: Shop the Headbanger Graphic Tee at Hendoshi. High-quality streetwear featuring a vintage heavy metal skull design. Perfect for metal fans and edgy style lovers.
